title: The Core Tenets of Human-Centered AI
description: A visual representation of the three foundational pillars and their interconnected goals that define the Human-Centered AI framework.
elements: AI Systems that Augment Human Intelligence
AI Systems that are Designed with Respect for Human Values
AI Systems that Remain Under Meaningful Human Control
relationships: These three core tenets are interdependent and must be pursued simultaneously to achieve the overall goal of creating AI that enhances human capabilities, is ethically aligned, and preserves human autonomy.
